item.title:
WeAreWST: WST @WeAreWST · 35min A RECORD-BREAKER!
11 Chinese players will compete at the Crucible for the very first time
Zhao
item.description:
WST @WeAreWST · 35min A RECORD-BREAKER!
11 Chinese players will compete at the Crucible for the very first time
Zhao Xintong Xiao Guodong Wu Yize Si Jiahui Ding Junhui Zhang Anda Zhou Yuelong Pang Junxu Lei Peifan He Guoqiang Fan Zhengyi 3 4 30 1 mil

item.title:
Livesnooker: Live Snooker @Livesnooker · 1h 𝗧𝗬𝗡𝗘𝗦𝗜𝗗𝗘 𝗧𝗘𝗥𝗥𝗢𝗥 𝗦𝗘𝗔𝗟𝗦 𝗜𝗧 𝗜𝗡 𝗦𝗧𝗬𝗟𝗘
Former World Championship semi-finalist Gary Wilson i
item.description:
Live Snooker @Livesnooker · 1h 𝗧𝗬𝗡𝗘𝗦𝗜𝗗𝗘 𝗧𝗘𝗥𝗥𝗢𝗥 𝗦𝗘𝗔𝗟𝗦 𝗜𝗧 𝗜𝗡 𝗦𝗧𝗬𝗟𝗘
Former World Championship semi-finalist Gary Wilson is back at The Crucible after producing a magnificent 126 break in the deciding frame to deny Xu Si Gary Wilson 6 723

item.title: Nick_Metcalfe: Nick Metcalfe @Nick_Metcalfe · 1h FWIW you have to fancy the winners of the PSG v Bayern semi-final to win the trophy. A
item.description: Nick Metcalfe @Nick_Metcalfe · 1h FWIW you have to fancy the winners of the PSG v Bayern semi-final to win the trophy. Anything can happen in a final, we know that, but the knockout draw has been so lopsided this season. I'll be surprised if Atletico or Arsenal win it. 2 2 584
